title: Per-Repository Limit Overrides
description: Per-repo limit overrides stored at <org>/pxl-classroom-control/limits-overrides.json. Optional. Resolution order: per-repo (this file) > per-org > global limits.yml.

repos.description: Map of repository name (without org prefix) to a map of SKU name -> override limit.

additionalProperties.description: Map of SKU name to override limit in the SKU's unit.
